briefdescription.para: This function initializes the config space.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success err on failure

briefdescription.para: This function initializes Egress PCIe bridge.
This function waits for Pcie link to come up.
This function waits for host to enumerate.

detaileddescription.para: On x86 BIOS sets memory enable bit On ARM64 it is set when driver gets inserted

briefdescription.para: This function read bar address of specific bar number.

memberdef.argsstring: (XPciePsu *PciePsuPtr, u32 IngressNum, u32 BarNum, u64 Dst)
memberdef.name: XPciePsu_EP_SetupIngress

briefdescription.para: This function sets up ingress translation.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if setup is successful XST_FAILURE if setup is fail

briefdescription.para: This function sets up Egress translation.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if setup is successful XST_FAILURE if setup is fail

briefdescription.para: Implements all of functions for psu_pci IP EndPoint driver.

para.preformatted:

1.0 tk 02/13/2019 First release
